name: Lycopodium Limited
analysis: LYL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$16.5900, stop A$13.4442, target A$26.0274 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
